ti:edition.ti:label: De Bello Gallico
ti:edition.ti:description: Julius Caesar. Aulus Hirtius. C. Iuli Commentarii Rerum in Gallia Gestarum VII A. Hirti Commentarius VII. Holmes, Thomas Rice, editor. Oxford: Clarendon Press, 1914.

ti:translation.ti:label: Gallic War
ti:translation.ti:description: Julius Caesar. Aulus Hirtius. Caesar’s Commentaries on the Gallic and Civil Wars. McDevitte, William Alexander and Bohn, W. S, translators. New York: Harper and Brothers, 1870-1872.
